vBRIEFInfo.author: agent:deft-directive-swarm
vBRIEFInfo.description: migrate:vbrief safety: .premigrate.* backups (always-on), --dry-run opt-in, dirty-tree guard, --rollback.

plan.title: migrate:vbrief safety: backups, dry-run, dirty-tree guard, rollback (#497)

narratives.Overview: Per #506 D7: default is destructive with explicit --dry-run opt-in. Always-on: .premigrate.* backups of pre-cutover inputs before any destructive write; dirty-tree guard refuses without --force; --rollback path available to restore from .premigrate.* and remove generated vBRIEF artifacts.
narratives.Problem: migrator is a one-way door: no backups, no preview, no dirty-tree guard, no rollback. Recovery today requires git or manual Copy-Item.
narratives.Action: Edit scripts/migrate_vbrief.py to: copy SPECIFICATION.md/PROJECT.md/ROADMAP.md/PRD.md/specification.vbrief.json to .premigrate.* siblings before destructive writes; implement --dry-run that prints migration plan without writing; implement dirty-tree guard (git status --porcelain non-empty => refuse unless --force); implement --rollback restoring from backups and removing generated artifacts; add .gitignore entries for .premigrate.*; update skills/deft-directive-setup/SKILL.md pre-cutover guard to document flags.
narratives.Test: Synthetic fixtures under deft/tests/fixtures/ covering: backups emitted + content identical; --dry-run exits 0 without modifying tree; dirty-tree refuses without --force; --rollback restores originals and removes generated files; .gitignore contains .premigrate.* entries.
narratives.Outcome: Destructive default is safe in practice: every run creates backups, dirty trees are refused, rollback is available. Coordinates with #498 (on validation failure: backups preserved, partial output in vbrief.invalid/).

items.title: Follow directive guidelines: AGENTS.md, deft/main.md, deft/QUICK-START.md, conventional commits, task check before commit
Automatic .premigrate.* backups of all pre-cutover inputs
Implement --dry-run preview mode (no writes, print plan)
Update skills/deft-directive-setup/SKILL.md pre-cutover guard and deft/QUICK-START.md to document flags
Synthetic fixture tests for backups, dry-run, dirty-tree refuse, rollback
